title: Feel Good Inc.
why_this_song: Feel Good Inc. by Gorillaz (2005) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Take it all in on your stride

exercises.prompt_en: Put the words in the right order:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque as palavras na ordem certa:

exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque as palavras na ordem certa:

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "feel" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "feel" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "good" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "good" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Gorillaz one question about "Feel Good Inc.", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Gorillaz sobre "Feel Good Inc.", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Feel Good Inc." in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Feel Good Inc." com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Feel Good Inc." in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Feel Good Inc." em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Feel Good Inc." in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Feel Good Inc." em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Feel Good Inc." as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Feel Good Inc." como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?
